title: REA India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: REA India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
